hits.evidence: Writes session-lifecycle metadata on a session bead ID. session_reconcile.go (NOT the already-named session_reconciler.go) is a major un-inventoried session-bead WRITER file holding ~14 SetMetadata/SetMetadataBatch sites against session.ID.
Quarantine patch persisted on the session bead. Must route to session store.
wake_attempts + quarantine accrual written on session.ID (lines 711/718/726). Session lifecycle state.
churn_count and last_woke_at writes on session.ID (lines 743/766/801/809/819/828). Session lifecycle state.
Session metadata batch on session.ID; comment at line 910 references the closeBead path on session beads. Session-store write.
Two more session.ID metadata batch writes in the wake-resume path. Session-store writes.
ProjectLifecycle over a session bead — session-class read/projection consumer.
detached_at is session-lifecycle metadata written on session.ID. session_sleep.go is an un-inventoried session-bead writer.
sleep_policy_* fingerprint batch on session.ID. Session-store write.
sleep_intent on session.ID. Session-store write.
SleepPatch written on session.ID. Session-store write.
Lifecycle projection over a session bead. Session-class read consumer.

Direct CREATE of a session bead (type=session/gc:session) plus follow-up Close/SetMetadata on it (lines 211/223/230/231). A session-bead creation site outside the named 10 — must route to session store.

hits.func: newPoolSessionBeadFor (Labeled query builder for pool name)
hits.evidence: Constructs a session-class query (Type+Label) used to enumerate/reserve session names. Session-store read.
Lists session beads to resolve a session identifier. Session-store read.

Crash-adoption CREATES session beads directly (lines 233-238). A second session-bead creation site outside the named 10. Must route to session store, and openSessionBeadExists (line 276) gates it via ListAllSessionBeads.
Loads existing session beads for adoption dedup; openSessionBeadExists re-queries session beads by session_name. Session-store reads gating the Create above.
held_until/sleep_intent/state written on a session bead ID during `gc session suspend`. Session-store write outside the named 10.
`gc session list` enumerates session beads. Session-store read.

Reads durable WAIT beads (gc:wait) to compute the ready-wait set for session listing. Wait beads classify to ClassSessions, so this read must federate to the session store. Outside the named 10 (cmd_session.go).
Lifecycle projection over a session bead in cmd_session.go. Session-class read consumer.
pin_awake is session-lifecycle metadata; guarded by IsSessionBeadOrRepairable (line 110). Session-store write outside the named 10.
Enumerates session beads by gc:session label and WRITES sleep_reason on each during `gc stop` (lines 351/364). Both a session-store read and write outside the named 10.
Loads the session-bead snapshot that seeds the runtime provider's name resolution. Label-only session-store read outside the named 10.
One-time scan of session beads to build the in-memory reconciler index. Session-store read outside the named 10 (calls the session_beads.go helper).
Loads all session beads into the snapshot used everywhere downstream. Session-store read outside the named 10.
Session identifier resolution enumerates session beads and repairs empty types. Session-store read/repair outside the named 10.
Doctor enumerates the Type=session ∪ gc:session union to audit the session model. Session-store read outside the named 10.

hits.op: loadSessionBeads(store) then SetMetadataBatch(beadID, kvs) at line 246
hits.evidence: Loads session beads (line 109) and migrates session-cleanup metadata via SetMetadataBatch (line 246) on session-bead IDs. Both read and WRITE on session beads, outside the named 10. (Same loop also migrates type=task work beads at line 92 — those stay on work store.)
Classifies beads as the session/control-plane registry for backlog-depth reporting. Read-only session classification consumer outside the named 10.
Mail identity resolution enumerates session beads (memoized) to map senders/recipients to sessions. Session-store reads outside the named 10. No writes.
Tab-completion enumerates session beads. Session-store read outside the named 10.
Status snapshot reads session beads to report session health. Read-only session consumer outside the named 10.
Template rendering resolves session beads for the `session` template function (prompt.go:397). Read-only session consumer outside the named 10.
`gc session logs` resolves the target session bead. Read-only session consumer outside the named 10.

hits.op: AwakeInput{ReadyWaitSet: readyWaitSet, ...} + ProjectLifecycle per session bead (line 102)
hits.evidence: Bridges session beads + the durable-wait ready set into the awake/sleep decision. Pure consumer of already-loaded session+wait beads; the upstream LOAD of readyWaitSet must come from the session store. Outside the named 10.

hits.op: input.ReadyWaitSet[bead.ID] (durable-wait readiness gate on session resume)
hits.evidence: Durable WAIT readiness drives session resume (lines 33/349/370/371). Pure in-memory consumer, but the wait-bead source feeding it is session-class. Outside the named 10.
Probes for a live OPEN session bead by identity (intentional label-only query, see comment 391-405). Session-store read outside the named 10.

hits.op: store.Update(id, UpdateOpts{Assignee:"", Status:"open", Metadata: withClearedSessionAffinityMetadata + detachedProbe})
hits.evidence: LANDMINE: this mutates a WORK bead (clears assignee, reopens, clears session-affinity + detached_probe). It is gated on session liveness but operates on the work store and MUST NOT move to the session store.
LANDMINE: detachedProbeMetadataKey is a WORK-bead metadata contract (detached_probe.go:16-18). Called from session_reconciler.go:3062 on item.bead (a work bead). Stays on work store.

hits.op: sessionBeadAssigneeIdentities(sb) to map WORK beads to session templates
hits.evidence: LANDMINE-adjacent: reads in-memory session beads only to scope/classify WORK beads (assignee→template). The store ops it informs are work-store ops; session beads are consumed from a passed slice, not queried/mutated here.
Consumes already-loaded session beads to compute pool demand against work; no store op gated here. Informational join, work-side.
LANDMINE: called from cmd_convoy_dispatch.go:1373 on a convoy SOURCE (work) bead. Despite the 'session' in the name, it clears session-affinity metadata on a WORK bead and stays on the work store.

hits.op: case hasBeadLabel(b.Labels, session.LabelSession) || b.Type==session.BeadType -> session; case session.WaitBeadLabel -> wait
hits.evidence: This IS the per-bead class router that maps session/wait beads to their policy/backend. Not a call site to relocate — it is the classification seam the refactor depends on. Must recognize both session AND wait beads as ClassSessions.

The federation seam itself: registers the relocated SQLite/Postgres session backend on the Router so session+wait Create/by-id route to it and List federates. Comment (286-296) is explicit that session+wait classify to ClassSessions and the IsSessionBeadOrRepairable/hasNonSessionAssignedWork post-filters keep the split correct. This is the central mechanism, not a missed call site.

Documents and implements that BOTH session lifecycle beads and durable session waits (type=gate/gc:wait) classify to ClassSessions. Confirms the wait/gate class is part of the session-store routing surface — any wait-bead op is in scope.

summary: The hand-written 10-file list misses a large session-bead surface. The biggest gap is cmd/gc/session_reconcile.go (note: distinct from the already-named session_reconciler.go) and cmd/gc/session_sleep.go — together they hold ~17 SetMetadata/SetMetadataBatch writes on session.ID (last_woke_at, churn_count, wake_attempts, rate-limit quarantine, sleep_intent, sleep_policy_*, detached_at, held_until). Two additional session-bead CREATE sites exist outside the named files: session_name_lookup.go:211 (pool create) and adoption_barrier.go:233 (crash adoption), each with follow-up Close/SetMetadata. Other writers: cmd_session.go:1601 (suspend held_until), cmd_session_pin.go:125 (pin_awake), cmd_stop.go:364 (sleep_reason). Many read-only session-store consumers also live outside the list (providers.go, session_index.go, session_bead_snapshot.go, session_resolve.go, doctor_session_model.go, cmd_mail.go, completion.go, city_status_snapshot.go, template_resolve.go, cmd_session_logs.go). The durable-WAIT (gc:wait/type=gate) class is also session-routed: readyWaitSetForList in cmd_session.go:1322 (via loadWaitBeads) and the awake bridge feed it into resume decisions. LANDMINES that must STAY on the work store despite session-sounding names: pool_session_name.go:364 releaseOrphanedPoolAssignment, pool_session_name.go:260 / detached_probe.go clearDetachedProbeMetadata, and session_affinity_metadata.go:28 clearSessionAffinityMetadataOnBead (called on convoy work beads) — all mutate WORK beads. The federation seam itself is api_state.go (registerSessionStoreBackend/sessionRelocated) plus the bead_policy_store.go/class_store.go classifier that routes both session and wait beads to ClassSessions.
